creator: joris.dedieu@nfrance.com
text:
On Sat, 19 May 2012 12:49:05 GMT
ak@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [PATCH] graphics/tinyows fix master site and maintainer address
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: ak
> State-Changed-When: Sat May 19 12:49:05 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> It seems that tarball was rerolled. Do you know what changed?

The diff is quite massive. But it seems to be only code cleanup and copyright 
update (tinyows just joined the OsGeo fundation). Unfortunately the
upstream version did not change but I think we should increase  port revision.

Complete diff is at http://rmdir.fr/tinyows.diff.bz2
SHA1 (tinyows.diff.bz2) = 7d21d2b80f4636e0dc95072dc80b5b3624f0bfa2

Joris   
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168098
